name: MUNTZE
description: Muntze is a crypto portfolio intelligence platform that combines real-time wallet tracking with conversational AI. The platform aggregates holdings across 12+ blockchains including Ethereum, Solana, Bitcoin, Arbitrum, Base, Polygon, and Optimism, allowing users to view their complete portfolio in one interface. Unlike traditional portfolio trackers that display static dashboards, Muntze features an AI assistant that can answer natural language questions about user holdings, market conditions, and portfolio performance. The platform pulls real-time price data on over 14,000 tokens and integrates market news to provide context-aware responses. Users connect wallets in read-only mode, meaning the platform never has custody or transaction signing capabilities. Muntze is designed for crypto investors who hold assets across multiple chains and want faster clarity on what they own and how their portfolio is performing without manually checking multiple block explorers or aggregator apps.
